import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useBus } from '../context/BusContext'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import { CheckCircleIcon, ArrowLeftIcon, HomeIcon, XMarkIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline'; const BookingConfirmation = () => { const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false); const [bookingConfirmed, setBookingConfirmed] = useState(false); const [bookingId, setBookingId] = useState(''); const { selectedBus, selectedSeats, searchCriteria, setBooking } = useBus(); const { user } = useAuth(); const navigate = useNavigate(); useEffect(() => { if (!selectedBus || selectedSeats.length === 0) { navigate('/buses'); return; } }, [selectedBus, selectedSeats, navigate]); const calculateTotalPrice = () => { const basePrice = selectedSeats.length * 10; const vipCharges = selectedSeats.length * 5; // Simplified VIP calculation const serviceFee = selectedSeats.length > 0 ? 2 : 0; return basePrice + vipCharges + serviceFee; }; const handleProceedToPayment = () => { navigate('/payment'); }; const handleCancelBooking = () => { // Clear selected data and go back to search const { clearSelection } = useBus(); if (clearSelection) { clearSelection(); } navigate('/search'); }; const handleBackToSearch = () => { navigate('/search'); }; const handleViewDashboard = () => { navigate('/dashboard'); }; if (!selectedBus || selectedSeats.length === 0) { return null; } return (
{!bookingConfirmed ? ( <> {/* Header */}

Booking Confirmation

Review your booking details

{/* Journey Details */}
{/* Passenger Information */}

Passenger Information

{user?.name || 'Guest User'}
{user?.email || 'guest@example.com'}
+1 (555) 123-4567
{selectedSeats.length}
{/* Journey Details */}

Journey Details

From
{searchCriteria.source}
To
{searchCriteria.destination}
Date
{searchCriteria.date}
Duration
{selectedBus.duration || '8 hours'}
Departure
{selectedBus.departureTime}
Arrival
{selectedBus.arrivalTime}
{/* Bus & Seat Details */}

Bus & Seat Details

Operator
{selectedBus.operator}
Bus Type
{selectedBus.type}
Selected Seats
{selectedSeats.map(seatNumber => ( {seatNumber} ))}
{/* Price Summary & Payment */}

Price Summary

Base Fare ({selectedSeats.length} seats) ${selectedSeats.length * 10}
VIP Charges ${selectedSeats.length * 5}
Service Fee $2
Total ${calculateTotalPrice()}
By confirming, you agree to our terms and conditions
) : ( /* Success State */

Booking Confirmed!

Your tickets have been successfully booked

Booking ID
{bookingId}
Please save this for future reference
Journey
{searchCriteria.source} → {searchCriteria.destination}
Date
{searchCriteria.date}
Bus Operator
{selectedBus.operator}
Departure Time
{selectedBus.departureTime}
Seats
{selectedSeats.join(', ')}
Total Amount
${calculateTotalPrice()}

Important Information

  • • Please arrive at the boarding point 30 minutes before departure
  • • Carry a valid ID proof for verification
  • • Show your booking ID and ID proof at the boarding point
  • • Cancellation policy applies as per operator terms
)}
); }; export default BookingConfirmation;
